subcodes.first_line: O thou who art attracted to the fragrances of God! I pray God to send down upon thee heavenly blessings, quicken thy soul with everlasting life
subcodes.first_line_orig: ایتها المنجذبه بنفحات الله انی ادعو الله ان ینزل علیک برکه سماویه و یحیی قلبک
subcodes.subjects: @spiritual transformation, @walking the spiritual path; spiritual wayfaring; the virtuous life, @service to others; to the Cause of God, @The Holy Spirit, @being a source of light; guidance
